articles.author: Kirsten Matoy Carlson
articles.title: When a president is unfit for office, here’s what the Constitution says can happen - The Conversation
articles.description: Amid lawmakers’ calls for the president’s removal from office, Americans may be wondering what would come next.
articles.content:
Bipartisan calls for President Donald Trumps removal from office increased on April 7, 2026, after he issued threats to destroy a whole civilization if Iran refuses to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
